title: 人像写实摄影图
description: A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="ash-blonde"} hai
prompt_raw: A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="ash-blonde"} hair blowing gently in the wind, pale skin, and large, expressive eyes. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="Japanese school uniform with a light grey cardigan, white shirt, dark plaid bow tie, dark plaid pleated skirt, dark knee-high socks, and black leather loafers"}. Her arms are resting casually on her knees. The background is a bright {argument name="sky condition" default="clear blue sky with scattered white clouds"}, with a blurred {argument name="background setting" default="chain-link fence and green trees"} visible at the very bottom, suggesting a schoolyard. The lighting is bright, natural daylight with soft, cinematic shadows, emphasizing the realistic textures of her clothing and skin.
prompt_preview: A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="ash-blonde"} hai
prompt_display_cn:
案例「hair color」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed, 照片写实 anime-风格 肖像 of a young woman crouching down and looking s光线ly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing 【hair color：ash-blonde】 hair blowing gently in the wind, pale skin, and large, expressive eyes. She is wearing a 【outfit：Japanese school uniform with a 光线 grey 卡片igan, white shirt, dark plaid bow tie, dark plaid pleated skirt, dark knee-high socks, and black leather loafers】. Her arms are resting casually on her knees. The 背景 is a bright 【sky condition：clear blue sky with scattered white clouds】, with a blurred 【背景 setting：chain-link fence and green trees】 visible at the very bottom, suggesting a schoolyard. The 光线ing is bright, natural day光线 with soft, 电影感 shadows, emphasizing the realistic textures of her clothing and skin.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
